caption: A man with a tall, stylized gray and black pompadour hairstyle sits in a studio setting, wearing glasses, a white button-down shirt with a bow tie, and light-colored suspenders. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a black professional microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous small framed photographs and a white storage unit. To the left, a logo reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" with a microphone graphic. To the right, text says "BOSS TALK 101". Across the frames, the man remains in a seated position, looking downward and slightly to the side with a neutral expression. His posture and the surrounding environment remain static, with only subtle shifts in his head position and facial expression as he looks down, maintaining a consistent focus away from the camera.
